title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.430 - Joint fire department — use of building
text:
71.430.  Joint fire department — use of building. — The building to be erected as herein provided may be used jointly for such other municipal purposes as may be provided by ordinance passed by each of the contracting parties.
(RSMo 1939 § 7394) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 7243
